_meta.owner: Christopher owns backend runner/schema; Jillian/Christopher should jointly review final calibration content.
_meta.purpose: Six near-miss brand voice cases for calibrating the Agent 2.0 0.75 voice confidence threshold.
_meta.notes: Cases intentionally include close calls, not only obvious pass/fail examples. Run live with Sonnet only when calibrating threshold and reason quality.

cases.text: When your skin is doing the most, keep it simple. A few spritzes of SOS Daily Rescue Facial Spray help your skin feel refreshed and comfortable, without making your routine feel complicated. Good Clean Fun for sensitive-looking skin.
A clinically advanced antimicrobial facial spray engineered to treat flare-ups, repair barrier dysfunction, and deliver measurable dermatological correction with every application.

Subject: Protocol-grade skin maintenance

Body: This daily-use facial spray supports a controlled hygiene regimen for users seeking a sterile, dermatologist-style intervention for reactive skin events.

Hook: MAGIC DRIP said sparkle now, overthink never.

Script: tap it on, let the glitter catch the light, then go be the main character. no rules, just shine.

CTA: tag us when your lips enter the chat.
Correct imperfections with a flawless, age-defying finish. This refined lip formula creates a polished appearance for anyone who wants a more proper, perfected look.

Subject: New gloss is here

Body: Add a pretty shine to your routine with a smooth lip gloss that looks nice for daytime or evening. Shop the latest shade today.
